$comment: Hardware-aware catalog of local MLX models (Apple Silicon). Entries are ordered small -> large; `preferred` ranks the repos defaultTrioFor picks first; `gatewayDefaultModel` is the standalone model-gateway fallback. Refresh sizes/metadata from the HuggingFace hub with `node scripts/generate-local-catalog.mjs` (hand-tuned fields like minRamGB/blurb/role are preserved). Regenerate bindings with `node scripts/generate-registry.mjs`.

entries.label: Llama 3.2 1B Instruct
entries.blurb: tiny and fast; great for low-memory machines and quick panels

entries.label: Gemma 3 1B Instruct
entries.blurb: small Google model; a strong, diverse panel voice

entries.label: Qwen3 1.7B
entries.blurb: capable small all-rounder; a good default panel member

entries.label: Llama 3.2 3B Instruct
entries.blurb: noticeably stronger than 1B while still light

entries.label: Qwen3 4B
entries.blurb: well-rounded mid-size model; good quality-to-size ratio

entries.label: Qwen2.5 Coder 7B
entries.blurb: code-specialized; a strong local coding panelist

entries.label: Qwen3 14B
entries.blurb: frontier-ish local quality; needs a roomy machine

entries.label: Qwen2.5 Coder 32B
entries.blurb: the strongest local coder here; for 36GB+ Macs
